message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Commit your CSS token adjustments now">
Lea — Steve Schoger notes that static/css/main.css has unstaged modifications (your approved token adjustments). Please commit those changes now so they're not at risk. A simple commit message like "Apply approved design token adjustments" is fine. Don't push yet — wait until Luca has the Rust scaffolding committed so we can push together with a green CI.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Let me check the current state -- I thought I already committed everything.

input.description: Check if CSS has unstaged changes

content.text:
No diff on `static/css/main.css` -- the file has no unstaged modifications. All my CSS changes are already committed across two commits:

- `06c8ee0` -- "Add CSS design tokens and base styles foundation" (Steve's specs encoded)
- `028bba1` -- "Add motion-safe tokens, skip link focus reveal, and contrast docs" (Heydon's fixes)

The only uncommitted changes are `.gitignore` (modified) and Luca's new scaffolding work (`Cargo.toml`, `Cargo.lock`, `src/`) -- none of which are mine.

input.content:
All CSS work is already committed -- no unstaged modifications to `static/css/main.css`. The file was committed in two separate commits:

- `06c8ee0` -- CSS design tokens foundation (Steve's full spec)
- `028bba1` -- Motion-safe tokens, skip link focus reveal, contrast docs (Heydon's fixes)

`git diff static/css/main.css` returns empty. The only uncommitted changes in the repo are `.gitignore` (modified) and Luca's new scaffolding (`Cargo.toml`, `Cargo.lock`, `src/`) -- those are his to commit.

Ready and waiting for task consensus.
